items.title: Code Review Best Practices
items.description:
1. Review in small batches (<400 lines)
2. Check for security issues first
3. Ensure tests cover edge cases
4. Look for performance regressions
5. Verify error handling is comprehensive

items.title: System Architecture Overview
items.description: High-level system architecture diagram showing microservices and data flow

items.title: On-call Runbook
items.description:
## PagerDuty Response
1. Acknowledge within 5 min
2. Check Grafana dashboard
3. If DB issue → restart read replica
4. If API issue → rollback last deploy
5. Escalate to SRE if unresolved after 15 min
